notes: Twice-daily Reads run (second of 2026-07-08, finalized 2026-07-09 UTC). INFRA NOTE: all deterministic verify gates initially false-FAILed at ~15pct grounding due to a pipeline-wide ledger bug — CitationLedgerEntrySchema.firstSeen requires z.string().datetime() (full ISO), but the researcher skill reference example and all writers emit date-only (2026-07-08), so readLedgerFile silently drops every entry. Worked around by normalizing the ephemeral (uncommitted) per-slug ledgers to ISO datetime; recommend a real fix at packages/core/src/citation-ledger.ts (accept date-only) or the researcher skill example + writer output.

notes: Second run 2026-07-09/10. Survey slate 9; picked 4 (teardown/chronicle/primer/dispatch). notes: Second twice-daily Reads run of 2026-07-10.
